repos.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
repos.desc: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.desc: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

repos.name: TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
repos.desc: TencentDB Agent Memory delivers fully local long-term memory for AI Agents via a 4-tier progressive pipeline, with zero external API dependencies.

repos.name: prisma/prisma
repos.desc: Next-generation ORM for Node.js & TypeScript | PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and CockroachDB

repos.name: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
repos.desc: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

repos.name: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
repos.desc: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

repos.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
repos.desc: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

repos.name: obra/superpowers
repos.desc: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

repos.name: alibaba/zvec
repos.desc: A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database

repos.name: Diolinux/PhotoGIMP
repos.desc: A Patch for GIMP 3+ for Photoshop Users

repos.name: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
repos.desc: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

repos.name: bradautomates/claude-video
repos.desc: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

repos.name: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
repos.desc: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

blog_md:
# 🍿 程序员今日吃瓜：agent-skills 爆火，JavaScript 又双叒叕赢了

> 📅 2026-07-09  |  🔍 共收录 15 个热门项目

起床上班第一件事：打开电脑。第二件事：打开 GitHub Trending 看看又有多少大牛做出了你一年前的 TODO 项目 😭

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**TypeScript**: 3 | **JavaScript**: 2 | **Rust**: 2 | **Python**: 2 | **C++**: 2

> TypeScript 又来了。记住：any 是毒药，never 是解药。

---
